rule_text: - **Native Vector (NV)**: A vector of GFP numbers, may contain multiple groups
- **Row**: A row of compute tiles, each row has its own row_bram for activations (mapped to GDDR6 channel)
First (V % num_rows) rows get (V / num_rows + 1) NVs.
llm_rationale: This requires using the stated row distribution rule for V.

rule_text: First (C % num_cols) columns get (C / num_cols + 1) NVs.
llm_rationale: This requires using the stated column distribution rule for C.

rule_text: Distribute evenly, remainder goes to lower-indexed partitions.
llm_rationale: This requires work to be partitioned evenly with remainders assigned to lower indexes.

rule_text:
**Maximum safe back-to-back FETCH-DISPATCH operations = Number of Columns**
  - Each tile BRAM holds 128 NVs
  - Each FETCH brings 128 NVs to distribute
  - With N columns: N dispatches × 128 NVs = N columns × 128 NV capacity

rule_text:
**Dual-Memory Architecture**:
  - BRAM: Low-latency result storage and command buffering
  - GDDR6: High-bandwidth matrix data storage
Clear separation of control and data paths.
llm_rationale: This requires the memory system to separate control and data paths clearly.

rule_text: - **Circular Buffer Pattern**: Dual-pointer management (rd_ptr/wr_ptr) for streaming results
- **Hierarchical Buffering**: Multiple BRAM levels to decouple processing stages
- **2-D Tile Array**: 16×16 compute tiles with row/column organization
- **row_bram**: Per-row activation storage (left matrix), one per row
- **mlp_bram**: Shared weight storage (right matrix), broadcast to all columns
All inter-module communication uses ready/valid protocol.
llm_rationale: This requires inter-module communication to use the ready/valid protocol.

rule_text: FIFOs between pipeline stages for flow control and timing isolation.
llm_rationale: This requires FIFOs between pipeline stages for flow control and timing isolation.

rule_text: Automatic partitioning across rows (V) and columns (C).

rule_text: Ready/valid signals between all FSMs.
